title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Law, Orochi, Toki, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd like you to keep this child at the castle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He works well, and can even make medicine. He's like my little brother.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: I've finally clawed my way up here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If something untoward were to happen to me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: News of Lord Sukiyaki's death spread throughout Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fourth year of Oden's voyage. One day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this the sign of an impending catastrophe?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They're running away from that island, whitebeady!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Does some sorta monster live there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I don't wanna! It's funner not knowing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WaHahaha! It'll be okay, Hiyori and MOMONOSUKE! It's nothing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're kidding me! Even these wild beasts are running amok!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world is on that island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You lot are just boring me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whitebeard's ship's on the other side of this island!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: We just fought a battle, Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: whitebeard, eh? It's been a while.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As it is, I don't have much longer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's have a little fun, then! A battle to the death, because we're both so very alive!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This may well be the last time we see each other, whitebeard!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 44 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
